commit.message:
[renovate] Refresh generated gate surfaces for ws-0297

Purpose: Align the rebased ws-0297 branch with the generated README and diagram surfaces required by the build-server validation lanes before the live Gitea replay.

Scope: Regenerate the README document index and agent coordination diagram, and record the remote-validate plus remote-pre-push gate evidence.

Status: The corrected branch now passes the build-server remote-validate and full remote-pre-push gates locally and is ready for a live Gitea branch push without rerunning the same local hook.

Next: Push the validated branch snapshot into the private Gitea repo, verify the push-triggered workflows, and rerun the Renovate workflow end to end.

See also: ADR 0297
